name: Bath
metaTitle: Bath private schools | The Private School Guide
metaDescription: Independent guide to Bath private schools. Compare schools, review fees and bursaries, explore open days, and use the map to narrow your shortlist.

schoolCards.name: King Edward’s School
schoolCards.subhead: All-through day school in central Bath, with nursery-to-sixth-form continuity, strong academic breadth and a broad co-curricular programme.

schoolCards.name: Kingswood School
schoolCards.subhead: Large co-educational senior school on Lansdown, combining day places with boarding and broad A-level depth across sciences, humanities and economics.

map.name: Kingswood School
map.note: Senior school · Co-ed · Day & boarding · Ages 11–19

schoolCards.name: Kingswood Preparatory School
schoolCards.subhead: Prep school in Lansdown with a linked senior-school route, broad co-curricular life and day-only format from nursery through Year 6.

map.name: Kingswood Preparatory School
map.note: Prep school · Co-ed · Day · Ages 9 months–11

schoolCards.name: Prior Park College
schoolCards.subhead: Co-educational senior school above Bath with day and boarding places, a Catholic foundation and a sixth form with broad humanities-science balance.

map.name: Prior Park College
map.note: Senior school · Co-ed · Day & boarding · Ages 11–18

schoolCards.name: Paragon School
schoolCards.subhead: Prep school in Bath with a linked route into Prior Park College, a broad curriculum and a strong emphasis on small classes.

schoolCards.name: Monkton Combe School
schoolCards.subhead: All-through day and boarding school just outside Bath, with a countryside setting and a sixth form notable for art, sciences and broad subject choice.

map.name: Monkton Combe School
map.note: All-through school · Co-ed · Day & boarding · Ages 2–19

schoolCards.name: Royal High School Bath, GDST
schoolCards.subhead: Girls’ day and boarding school in Lansdown with all-through provision, a substantial sixth form and broad A-level take-up in psychology and sciences.

map.name: Royal High School Bath, GDST
map.note: All-through school · Girls · Day & boarding · Ages 3–18

schoolCards.name: Bath Academy
schoolCards.subhead: Small day and boarding college in central Bath focused on GCSE and A-level pathways, with personalised academic support and a compact sixth form.

map.name: Bath Academy
map.note: Senior school · Co-ed · Day & boarding · Ages 14–19

schoolCards.name: Downside School
schoolCards.subhead: Co-educational day and boarding school near Radstock, included in the Bath guide for families willing to look beyond the city itself.

map.name: Downside School
map.note: Senior school · Bath-area · Co-ed · Day & boarding · Ages 11–18
